auth.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

dashboard.noTasks: No tasks yet. Create your first task!

task.keywordsHint: Words Claude sessions are matched against. Comma-separated.
task.title: Title

onboarding.howDoYouUse: How do you use Claude? We'll walk you through linking it to ClaudeCurate.
onboarding.manualSubtitle: I'll track tasks manually for now
onboarding.manualMessage: No problem — ClaudeCurate works great as a standalone task tracker. You can connect Claude at any time from Profile → Claude Integration.

trackA.step1Desc: This script runs whenever Claude Code finishes a session. Save it as ~/claude-hook.sh on your computer.
trackA.step1Save: Save this file anywhere on your computer, e.g. your home folder (~/claude-hook.sh)
trackA.step2Desc: Run this once in your terminal to give the script permission to execute.
trackA.step3Desc: Add this to ~/.claude/settings.json. If the file doesn't exist, create it.
trackA.step4Desc: Simulate a hook firing by running this in your terminal. Create a task with matching keywords first, then check your dashboard.
trackA.step4Alert: If a task's keywords match "test task completed", it will auto-complete within 30 seconds.
trackA.step5Desc: When Claude Code finishes a session, ClaudeCurate will automatically match and complete relevant tasks. Add Claude keywords to your tasks to improve matching accuracy.

trackB.step1Desc: This token identifies your account. It's already embedded in the config snippet in the next step.
trackB.step1Alert: Keep this token private — it grants access to your task list.
trackB.step2Desc: Add this to your Claude Desktop config file. Your token is already filled in.
trackB.step3Desc: Fully quit and reopen Claude Desktop so it loads the new MCP server configuration.
trackB.step3Alert: Make sure to fully quit (not just close the window) before reopening.
trackB.step4Desc: This tells Claude to automatically log what it accomplished at the end of every conversation.
trackB.step4Where: In Claude Desktop: Settings → Custom Instructions → paste the text above.
trackB.step5Desc: Claude Desktop will call ClaudeCurate at the end of each conversation and auto-complete matching tasks.
trackB.step5Note: This relies on Claude following your custom instruction — it works ~95% of the time.

profile.title: Profile
profile.integrationDesc: Your webhook token links your Claude hooks or MCP server to this account.
profile.integrationAlert: Auto-completion requires Claude Code CLI or Claude Desktop with MCP. Claude.ai web users can track tasks manually.
profile.confirmRegenDesc: This will invalidate your current token. Any existing claude-hook.sh scripts or MCP configs using the old token will stop working until you update them with the new token.
profile.newTokenGenerated: New token generated. Update your hook script or MCP config.
profile.languageDesc: Controls the language Claude uses when logging sessions.
